title: OpenAI raises $122 billion to accelerate the next phase of AI

structured_analysis.background: OpenAI Blog 于 2026-03-31 发布相关动态。
structured_analysis.key_action: OpenAI closed its latest funding round with $122 billion in committed capital at a post-money valuat
structured_analysis.technical_implication: Amazon agreed to invest $50 billion, while Nvidia and SoftBank each put in $30 billion

trend_insight: 监管讨论正从原则倡议转向更具体的制度和责任边界。
original_title: OpenAI raises $122 billion to accelerate the next phase of AI
